title: Developing a Customer Avatar for an Eco-Friendly Brand
scenario: Create a detailed persona description (json) for an eco-friendly retail company targeting environmentally conscious consumers. The persona should include demographics, values, shopping habits, and product preferences. The description should be concise and under 150 words, and should highlight the persona's willingness to invest in sustainable brands.
constraints: Must include at least three key values related to environmental sustainability
Must highlight the persona's preferred shopping channels (online, offline, or both)

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the prompt ensure a thorough and detailed persona description?
Does the prompt adhere to the given constraints?
Does the prompt maintain an objective tone and avoid biases?
